mapper.select: SELECT bl.id, bl.name, bl.description, bl.cover_url, bl.is_public, bl.user_id, bl.share_token, bl.created_at, bl.updated_at, COUNT(bli.id) AS book_count FROM booklist bl LEFT JOIN booklist_item bli ON bl.id = bli.booklist_id WHERE bl.user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY bl.id ORDER BY bl.updated_at DESC

SELECT bl.id, bl.name, bl.description, bl.cover_url, bl.is_public, bl.user_id, bl.share_token, bl.created_at, bl.updated_at, COUNT(bli.id) AS book_count FROM booklist bl LEFT JOIN booklist_item bli ON bl.id = bli.booklist_id WHERE bl.id = #{id} GROUP BY bl.id

SELECT bl.id, bl.name, bl.description, bl.cover_url, bl.is_public, bl.user_id, bl.share_token, bl.created_at, bl.updated_at, COUNT(bli.id) AS book_count FROM booklist bl LEFT JOIN booklist_item bli ON bl.id = bli.booklist_id WHERE bl.share_token = #{shareToken} AND bl.is_public = 1 GROUP BY bl.id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO booklist (name, description, cover_url, is_public, user_id, share_token) VALUES (#{name}, #{description}, #{coverUrl}, #{isPublic}, #{userId}, #{shareToken})
mapper.update: UPDATE booklist SET share_token = #{shareToken} WHERE id = #{id}
